Class NDD

java.lang.Object
org.ants.jndd.diagram.NDD
public class NDD extends Object

      The internal BDD engine (shared with node table).

      Current number of declared fields (0-based).

      public NDD()

  • Method Details

    • initNDD

      public static void initNDD(int nddTableSize, int bddTableSize, int bddCacheSize)
      Initialize NDD with default cache size.
      Parameters:
      nddTableSize - Max NDD node table size.
      bddTableSize - BDD node table size.
      bddCacheSize - BDD cache size.

    • initNDD

      public static void initNDD(int nddTableSize, int bddTableSize, int bddCacheSize, NDD.LabelMode mode)

    • initNDD

      public static void initNDD(int nddTableSize, int nddCacheSize, int bddTableSize, int bddCacheSize)
      Initialize NDD engine: node table, BDD engine, caches, and per-field arrays.
      Parameters:
      nddTableSize - Max NDD node table size.
      nddCacheSize - Size of not/and/or caches.
      bddTableSize - BDD node table size.
      bddCacheSize - BDD cache size.

    • initNDD

      public static void initNDD(int nddTableSize, int nddCacheSize, int bddTableSize, int bddCacheSize, NDD.LabelMode mode)

    • getLabelMode

      public static NDD.LabelMode getLabelMode()

    • isFiniteDomainZddMode

      public static boolean isFiniteDomainZddMode()

    • declareField

      public static int declareField(int bitNum)
      Declare a new field. Stores the bit number and reserves a field index. BDD variable creation is deferred to generateFields() for cross-field sharing.
      Parameters:
      bitNum - Number of bits in this field.
      Returns:
      The field index (0-based).

    • generateFields

      public static void generateFields()
      Generate all fields after declaration. Creates shared BDD variables with right-alignment so fields with the same bit-width share identical BDD variables, enabling BDD node reuse. Must be called after all declareField() calls and before any NDD operations.

    • getTrue

      public static int getTrue()
      Returns:
      Terminal node id for TRUE.

    • getFalse

      public static int getFalse()
      Returns:
      Terminal node id for FALSE.

    • isTrue

      public static boolean isTrue(int node)
      Returns:
      Whether the node is TRUE.

    • isFalse

      public static boolean isFalse(int node)
      Returns:
      Whether the node is FALSE.

    • isTerminal

      public static boolean isTerminal(int node)
      Returns:
      Whether the node is a terminal (TRUE or FALSE).

    • getFieldNum

      public static int getFieldNum()
      Returns:
      Number of declared fields.

    • getField

      public static int getField(int nodeId)
      Returns:
      The field index of a node.

    • getEdgeStart

      public static int getEdgeStart(int nodeId)
      Returns:
      The start index of edges for a node.

    • getEdgeCount

      public static int getEdgeCount(int nodeId)
      Returns:
      The number of edges of a node.

    • getEdgeTarget

      public static int getEdgeTarget(int edgeIndex)
      Returns:
      The target node id of an edge.

    • getEdgeTarget

      public static int getEdgeTarget(int nodeId, int offset)
      Returns:
      The target node id of the offset-th edge of a node.

    • getEdgeLabel

      public static int getEdgeLabel(int edgeIndex)
      Returns:
      The BDD handle of an edge label.

    • getEdgeLabel

      public static int getEdgeLabel(int nodeId, int offset)
      Returns:
      The BDD handle of the offset-th edge of a node.

    • getVar

      public static int getVar(int field, int index)
      Returns:
      NDD node id for positive literal at (field, index).

    • getNotVar

      public static int getNotVar(int field, int index)
      Returns:
      NDD node id for negative literal at (field, index).

    • getBDDVars

      public static int[] getBDDVars(int field)
      Returns:
      BDD variable handles for the field.

    • getNotBDDVars

      public static int[] getNotBDDVars(int field)
      Returns:
      BDD negated variable handles for the field.

    • getBDDEngine

      public static BDD getBDDEngine()
      Returns:
      The internal BDD engine.

      public static long getLabelNodeCount()

      public static long getLabelTotalCreated()

      public static void gcLabelEngine()

      public static int refLabel(int label)

    • derefLabel

      public static void derefLabel(int label)

    • isUniverseEdgeLabel

      public static boolean isUniverseEdgeLabel(int field, int label)

    • clearCaches

      public static void clearCaches()
      Clear not/and/or operation caches (e.g. after gc).

    • forEachTemporarilyProtect

      public static void forEachTemporarilyProtect(IntConsumer consumer)
      Apply consumer to each node id in the temporary protect set (used during gc).
      Parameters:
      consumer - Action to perform for each protected node id.

    • ref

      public static int ref(int nodeId)
      Increment reference count of a node (protect from gc).
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.
      Returns:
      The same node id.

    • deref

      public static void deref(int nodeId)
      Decrement reference count of a node.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - The node id.

    • mk

      public static int mk(int field, org.ants.jndd.diagram.NDD.IntIntMap edges)
      Create or reuse an NDD node with the given edges (target -> label map).
      Parameters:
      field - Field index.
      edges - Map from target node id to BDD label handle.
      Returns:
      The node id.

    • andTo

      public static int andTo(int a, int b)
      And two NDDs, store result in a (ref result, deref a).
      Parameters:
      a - First operand (consumed).
      b - Second operand.
      Returns:
      The result node id (ref'd).

    • orTo

      public static int orTo(int a, int b)
      Or two NDDs, store result in a (ref result, deref a).
      Parameters:
      a - First operand (consumed).
      b - Second operand.
      Returns:
      The result node id (ref'd).

    • and

      public static int and(int a, int b)
      Logical and of two NDDs (result not ref'd).
      Parameters:
      a - First operand.
      b - Second operand.
      Returns:
      The and result node id.

    • or

      public static int or(int a, int b)
      Logical or of two NDDs (result not ref'd).
      Parameters:
      a - First operand.
      b - Second operand.
      Returns:
      The or result node id.

    • not

      public static int not(int a)
      Logical not of an NDD (result not ref'd).
      Parameters:
      a - Operand.
      Returns:
      The not result node id.

    • diff

      public static int diff(int a, int b)
      Set difference: a and not(b).
      Parameters:
      a - First operand.
      b - Second operand.
      Returns:
      The result node id.

    • imp

      public static int imp(int a, int b)
      Implication: not(a) or b.
      Parameters:
      a - First operand.
      b - Second operand.
      Returns:
      The result node id.

    • satCount

      public static double satCount(int ndd)
      Number of satisfying assignments of the NDD (via conversion to BDD).
      Parameters:
      ndd - Root node id.
      Returns:
      Sat count.

    • getNodeCount

      public static long getNodeCount()
      Get the current number of allocated NDD nodes.
      Returns:
      Node count stored in the node table.

    • gc

      public static void gc()
      Run NDD garbage collection immediately.

    • getTotalCreated

      public static long getTotalCreated()
      Get the total number of NDD nodes ever created.
      Returns:
      Total created count (including garbage collected nodes).

    • encodePrefix

      public static int encodePrefix(int[] prefixBinary, int field)
      Encode a single binary prefix as an NDD (one node with one edge labeled by BDD).
      Parameters:
      prefixBinary - Binary prefix (e.g. for IP).
      field - Field index.
      Returns:
      NDD node id.

    • encodePrefixs

      public static int encodePrefixs(ArrayList<int[]> prefixsBinary, int field)
      Encode multiple binary prefixes as union (or) of prefix NDDs.
      Parameters:
      prefixsBinary - List of binary prefixes.
      field - Field index.
      Returns:
      NDD node id.

    • encodePrefixBDD

      public static int encodePrefixBDD(int[] prefixBinary, int[] vars, int[] notVars)
      Encode a binary prefix as a BDD using given variable handles.
      Parameters:
      prefixBinary - Binary prefix.
      vars - BDD positive literal handles.
      notVars - BDD negative literal handles.
      Returns:
      BDD handle for the prefix.

    • encodeACL

      public static int encodeACL(ArrayList<NDD.Pair<Integer,Integer>> perFieldBDD)
      Encode an ACL (list of per-field BDDs) as a multi-field NDD.
      Parameters:
      perFieldBDD - List of (field index, BDD handle) pairs.
      Returns:
      Root NDD node id.

    • toNDD

      public static int toNDD(int a, int field)
      Wrap a BDD handle as a single-field NDD.

    • toNDD

      public static int toNDD(int a)
      Convert a (multi-field decomposed) BDD to NDD by rebuilding structure per field.
      Parameters:
      a - BDD root handle.
      Returns:
      NDD root node id.

    • toBDD

      public static int toBDD(int root)
      Convert NDD to BDD (recursive: each node's edges OR'd with and(target_BDD, label)).
      Parameters:
      root - NDD root node id.
      Returns:
      BDD handle.

    • print

      public static void print(int root)
      Print NDD structure to stdout (debug).
      Parameters:
      root - Root node id.

    • printDot

      public static void printDot(int root, String filename)
      Export NDD as a Dot file for graph visualization.
      Parameters:
      root - Root node id.
      filename - Output file path.

    • exist

      public static int exist(int a, int field)
      Existential quantification: project out (remove) the given field.
      Parameters:
      a - NDD node id.
      field - Field to quantify out.
      Returns:
      Result node id.

    • encodeAtMostKFailureVarsSorted

      public static int encodeAtMostKFailureVarsSorted(BDD bdd, int[] vars, int startField, int endField, int k)
      Encode "at most k failures" constraint across fields as an NDD.
      Parameters:
      bdd - BDD engine.
      vars - BDD variable handles.
      startField - First field (failure vars start field).
      endField - Last field.
      k - Maximum failures allowed.
      Returns:
      NDD node id encoding the constraint.
